title: A Picture Can’t Take My Elan Vital
summary: In “A Picture Can’t Take My Elan Vital,” Cibelle Cavalli Bastos singles out a still image output of generative portraiture using StyleGAN2. The data set consists of Google search pictures of Cibelle Cavalli Bastos when they were known as a cis woman singer, as well as selfies taken while transitioning to non-binary and aging, from a personal archive spanning 20 years and their Instagram (@aevtarperform).
